message:
test(format): add tests for Parquet metadata types

Add 8 tests covering:
- Type.fromI32 (all 8 physical types)
- ConvertedType.fromI32 (key logical types)
- FieldRepetitionType.fromI32 (required/optional/repeated)
- Encoding.fromI32 (plain, RLE, dictionary encodings)
- CompressionCodec.fromI32 (uncompressed, snappy, zstd, etc.)
- PageType.fromI32 (data page, dictionary page, etc.)
- ColumnDescriptor.getName (path extraction)
- SchemaElement default values
